description: Canonical dependency list for Ordo AI Stack (M7 reliability spine). Probed by GET /api/dependencies.

entries.name: Model Gateway
entries.hint: OpenAI-compatible API proxy (LiteLLM). Routes inference from OpenClaw, Open WebUI, and n8n to llama.cpp.

entries.name: llama.cpp (llama-server)
entries.hint: GGUF inference; model-gateway proxies OpenAI /v1 to this service.

entries.name: MCP Gateway
entries.hint: Shared MCP tools; openclaw-mcp-bridge uses POST/SSE here. A plain GET may return HTTP 400 — that still means the gateway is up.

entries.name: OpenClaw Gateway
entries.hint: Agent runtime; depends on model-gateway + MCP.

entries.name: Ops Controller
entries.hint: Lifecycle/recovery; not on hot path for chat.

entries.name: Dashboard
entries.hint: Self-check only works when probe runs inside dashboard container (uses localhost).
